findings.title: huggingface/transformers
findings.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

findings.title: huggingface/pytorch-image-models
findings.description: The largest collection of PyTorch image encoders / backbones. Including train, eval, inference, export scripts, and pretrained weights -- ResNet, ResNeXT, EfficientNet, NFNet, Vision Transformer (ViT), MobileNetV4, MobileNet-V3 & V2, RegNet, DPN, CSPNet, Swin Transformer, MaxViT, CoAtNet, ConvNeXt, and more

findings.title: lucidrains/vit-pytorch
findings.description: Implementation of Vision Transformer, a simple way to achieve SOTA in vision classification with only a single transformer encoder, in Pytorch

findings.title: microsoft/Swin-Transformer
findings.description: This is an official implementation for "Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows".

findings.title: jacobgil/pytorch-grad-cam
findings.description: Advanced AI Explainability for computer vision.  Support for CNNs, Vision Transformers, Classification, Object detection, Segmentation, Image similarity and more.

findings.title: facebookresearch/dino
findings.description: PyTorch code for Vision Transformers training with the Self-Supervised learning method DINO

findings.title: cmhungsteve/Awesome-Transformer-Attention
findings.description: An ultimately comprehensive paper list of Vision Transformer/Attention, including papers, codes, and related websites

findings.title: dk-liang/Awesome-Visual-Transformer
findings.description: Collect some papers about transformer with vision. Awesome Transformer with Computer Vision (CV)

findings.title: google-research/big_vision
findings.description: Official codebase used to develop Vision Transformer, SigLIP, MLP-Mixer, LiT and more.

findings.title: Charmve/computer-vision-in-action
findings.description: A computer vision closed-loop learning platform where code can be run interactively online. 学习闭环《计算机视觉实战演练：算法与应用》中文电子书、源码、读者交流社区（持续更新中 ...） 📘 在线电子书 https://charmve.github.io/computer-vision-in-action/   👇项目主页

findings.title: jeonsworld/ViT-pytorch
findings.description: Pytorch reimplementation of the Vision Transformer (An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale)

findings.title: NVlabs/MambaVision
findings.description: [CVPR 2025] Official PyTorch Implementation of MambaVision: A Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Vision Backbone

findings.title: apple/ml-fastvit
findings.description: This repository contains the official implementation of the research paper, "FastViT: A Fast Hybrid Vision Transformer using Structural Reparameterization" ICCV 2023

findings.title: ViTAE-Transformer/ViTPose
findings.description: The official repo for [NeurIPS'22] "ViTPose: Simple Vision Transformer Baselines for Human Pose Estimation" and [TPAMI'23] "ViTPose++: Vision Transformer for Generic Body Pose Estimation"

findings.title: microsoft/Cream
findings.description: This is a collection of our NAS and Vision Transformer work.

findings.title: dandelin/ViLT
findings.description: Code for the ICML 2021 (long talk) paper: "ViLT: Vision-and-Language Transformer Without Convolution or Region Supervision"

findings.title: czczup/ViT-Adapter
findings.description: [ICLR 2023 Spotlight] Vision Transformer Adapter for Dense Predictions

findings.title: Yangzhangcst/Transformer-in-Computer-Vision
findings.description: A paper list of some recent Transformer-based CV works.

findings.title: IDEA-Research/awesome-detection-transformer
findings.description: Collect some papers about transformer for detection and segmentation. Awesome Detection Transformer for Computer Vision (CV)
